svg.text: Sampled rollouts and observed trajectories, three experiment families
Per family, two panels on identical axes: top row is the runs as actually observed; bottom row is one simulated rollout per run from its round-1 pool state.
Each panel shows the same runs in both rows; 4 of panel A's runs, 1 of panel B's runs are excluded for lacking a measurable round-1 agreement (ρ).
self-only pool; judges self / base / frozen / random
outside candidates from the base model or a trained peer
all 20 runs are risk-value; 0 insecure-code (that family is not in this figure)
